app.title: A cache-friendly IPv6 LPM with AVX-512 (linearized B+-tree, real BGP benchmarks)
app.author: debugga
proposed_tests: Install planb-lpm CLI and run a benchmark
Insert 1000 rows and measure write latency with AVX-512
Run a query with linearized B+-tree, measure query latency
